title: grammitis samoensis
intro: Grammitis samoensis, also known as Samoan shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Samoan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing inflammation and improving overall health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Grammitis samoensis can be made into a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
